title: Hody Moves the Fight Upward
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Hody Jones, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is hody moves the fight upward.
scene: The scene follows hody moves the fight upward, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Hody Jones, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: up 'til just now, he seemed to be writing in pain, even though he hadn't been injured...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't think...it could be the same thing as what happened to hody-san...?!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: come to think of it, he was scoffing down energy steroids like edamame with his drink...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now Hyouzou-San is a complete monster too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The power... I can feel it flowing through me... I wanna slice people up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no way to defend against him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, Robin. I'll take care of this guy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He ought to make a decent warm-up before I head out into the New World....!!

summary: Hody Moves the Fight Upward. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
